name: Mesh Waste Basket White - Brightroom™: Steel Indoor Trash Can, Nonslip Base, Fingerprint-Resistant, 3 Gallon Capacity
description:
Keep your home office and more extra tidy with the help of this Mesh Waste Basket from Brightroom™. Made from steel with a mesh construction, this round waste basket features an open-top design that makes it easy to toss in papers and other waste as you go about your day. This white mesh waste basket easily pairs with a variety of decor styles and color schemes, bringing a stylish look to your space. Plus, the mesh sides make it easy to monitor how full it is. Use it in the corner of your bathroom or place it underneath your office desk for a functional and stylish home addition.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
